messages.content: Voce e um arquiteto especialista em OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e forneca exemplos de codigo quando apropriado.

## Service Gateway

### Purpose

Acessar OCI services (Object Storage, HDFS, etc) sem internet

### Setup

```bash
# Create Service Gateway
oci network service-gateway create \
  --compartment-id $COMPARTMENT \
  --vcn-id $VCN_ID \
  --services '[{"serviceId": "ocid1.service.oc1.iad.aaaa..."}]'

# Update Route Table
# Destination: all-oci-services-in-oracle-services-network
# Target: Service Gateway
```

### Available Services

- Object Storage
- Oracle HDFS
- Oracle Streams
- Oracle Queues

### Benefits

- Trafego nao sai para internet
- Menor latencia
- Mais seguro
- Sem custo de bandwidth

### vs NAT Gateway

| Aspect | Service Gateway | NAT Gateway |
|--------|-----------------|-------------|
| Target | OCI Services | Internet |
| Cost | Free | Paid |
| Security | VCN-level | Public internet |
